totals._note: avg = (weekday×5 + weekend×2) / 7 — update these whenever meal items change

recommendations.title: Improve VO2 Max
recommendations.detail: Currently 32.9 mL/kg/min — below average for age 39. This is the strongest single predictor of longevity. Zone 2 cardio and intervals are the main levers.

recommendations.title: Consider switching to dark chocolate (70%+)
recommendations.detail: Dark chocolate 70%+ has significantly less sugar than milk chocolate, and has meaningful evidence behind it: flavanols support cardiovascular health (improved blood flow, lower blood pressure), and there's reasonable data for cognitive benefits too. It's also more satiating per calorie, so 100 kcal goes further. Worth trying as a swap once the current fat loss phase is established.

recommendations.title: Start Vitamin D3 + K2 (MK-7)
recommendations.detail: 2,000–4,000 IU D3 + 100 mcg K2 daily with food. UK latitude means near-zero UV synthesis Oct–Apr, and desk work limits exposure year-round. Strong evidence for metabolic health, immune function, and longevity. Test 25-OH vitamin D after 2–3 months to dial in dose.

recommendations.title: Start Magnesium Glycinate
recommendations.detail: 300–400 mg, 30–60 min before bed. Second most common nutrient deficiency, depleted further by exercise. Good RCT evidence for improved sleep latency and quality — relevant given 30-day sleep avg (7.2 hrs) below 90-day (7.5 hrs). Also supports insulin sensitivity and muscle recovery.

recommendations.title: Start Omega-3 (EPA+DHA)
recommendations.detail: 2–3g combined EPA+DHA daily with dinner. One of the strongest evidence-backed supplements for cardiovascular and brain health. Check the label — a '1,000 mg fish oil' capsule often contains only ~300 mg EPA+DHA. Anti-inflammatory effect is particularly relevant during a deficit with training.

planned.title: Fibre & Micronutrient Boost
planned.detail: 1 tbsp chia seeds in morning shake + 1 kiwi at ~3–4pm on weekdays. +~100 kcal/day, +~6g fibre/day. Adds vitamin C, calcium, magnesium, and prebiotic soluble fibre.

planned.title: VO2 Max Protocol
planned.detail: 2x runs/week at current pace (7.2 kph, ~160 bpm). Extend one run from 20 to 30 min over 6-8 weeks. No intervals during the deficit. Re-assess after fat loss phase ends.
